description: Create a content slide on selected frontier technologies with a left-side technology categorization bubble map and a right-side vertical bar chart of global market size, plus a sidebar chapter navigation.

header.headline: Selected technologies will see a tenfold increase in market size – An analysis of relevant innovations up to 2050 is called for

left.title: Selected frontier technologies and their categorization

items.text: Innovative digital technologies: Blockchain; New communication tech; IoT; Big data; AI; Quantum computing
Additional frontier technologies shown in adjacent categories: Green tech; Transportation tech; Smart robotics; New space

right.title: Global market size of selected technologies [USD bn]
